omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We want to inform you that whenever you use our Service, in a case of an error in the app we collect data and information (through third party products) on your phone called Log Data. This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol (“IP”) address, device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing our Service, the time and date of your use of the Service, and other statistics.

This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol (“IP”) address, device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing our Service, the time and date of your use of the Service, and other statistics.

For a better experience, while using our Service, we may require you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information, including but not limited mobile device's camera, storage, and other features. If you wish to change our access or permissions, you may do so in your device's settings.
